name: RoPE Attention
description: Multi-head self-attention with Rotary Positional Encoding (LLaMA-style)
code:
_ra{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_ra{{_id}}_h = {{n_heads}}
_ra{{_id}}_dk = _ra{{_id}}_d // _ra{{_id}}_h
_ra{{_id}}_wq = np.random.randn(_ra{{_id}}_d, _ra{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_ra{{_id}}_wk = np.random.randn(_ra{{_id}}_d, _ra{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_ra{{_id}}_wv = np.random.randn(_ra{{_id}}_d, _ra{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_ra{{_id}}_wo = np.random.randn(_ra{{_id}}_d, _ra{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_ra{{_id}}_bs, _ra{{_id}}_sl, _ = {{input}}.shape
# QKV projections -> multi-head
_ra{{_id}}_q = np.matmul({{input}}, _ra{{_id}}_wq.T).reshape(_ra{{_id}}_bs, _ra{{_id}}_sl, _ra{{_id}}_h, _ra{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_ra{{_id}}_k = np.matmul({{input}}, _ra{{_id}}_wk.T).reshape(_ra{{_id}}_bs, _ra{{_id}}_sl, _ra{{_id}}_h, _ra{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_ra{{_id}}_v = np.matmul({{input}}, _ra{{_id}}_wv.T).reshape(_ra{{_id}}_bs, _ra{{_id}}_sl, _ra{{_id}}_h, _ra{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
# RoPE
_ra{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _ra{{_id}}_dk, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _ra{{_id}}_dk))
_ra{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_ra{{_id}}_sl, dtype=np.float32)
_ra{{_id}}_angles = np.outer(_ra{{_id}}_pos, _ra{{_id}}_freqs)
_ra{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_ra{{_id}}_angles).astype(np.float32)
_ra{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_ra{{_id}}_angles).astype(np.float32)
_ra{{_id}}_q1, _ra{{_id}}_q2 = _ra{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2], _ra{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2]
_ra{{_id}}_q_rot = np.zeros_like(_ra{{_id}}_q)
_ra{{_id}}_q_rot[..., 0::2] = _ra{{_id}}_q1 * _ra{{_id}}_cos - _ra{{_id}}_q2 * _ra{{_id}}_sin
_ra{{_id}}_q_rot[..., 1::2] = _ra{{_id}}_q1 * _ra{{_id}}_sin + _ra{{_id}}_q2 * _ra{{_id}}_cos
_ra{{_id}}_k1, _ra{{_id}}_k2 = _ra{{_id}}_k[..., 0::2], _ra{{_id}}_k[..., 1::2]
_ra{{_id}}_k_rot = np.zeros_like(_ra{{_id}}_k)
_ra{{_id}}_k_rot[..., 0::2] = _ra{{_id}}_k1 * _ra{{_id}}_cos - _ra{{_id}}_k2 * _ra{{_id}}_sin
_ra{{_id}}_k_rot[..., 1::2] = _ra{{_id}}_k1 * _ra{{_id}}_sin + _ra{{_id}}_k2 * _ra{{_id}}_cos
# Scaled dot-product attention
_ra{{_id}}_scores = np.matmul(_ra{{_id}}_q_rot, _ra{{_id}}_k_rot.transpose(0, 1, 3, 2)) / np.sqrt(_ra{{_id}}_dk)
if {{mask}} is not None:
    _ra{{_id}}_scores = np.where({{mask}} == 0, -1e9, _ra{{_id}}_scores)
_ra{{_id}}_exp = np.exp(_ra{{_id}}_scores - np.max(_ra{{_id}}_scores, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_ra{{_id}}_attn = _ra{{_id}}_exp / np.sum(_ra{{_id}}_exp, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_ra{{_id}}_attended = np.matmul(_ra{{_id}}_attn, _ra{{_id}}_v)
# Concat heads and output projection
_ra{{_id}}_concat = _ra{{_id}}_attended.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(_ra{{_id}}_bs, _ra{{_id}}_sl, _ra{{_id}}_d)
{{output}} = np.matmul(_ra{{_id}}_concat, _ra{{_id}}_wo.T)

graph.description: RoPE Attention decomposed: Linear projections -> RoPE -> MHA core -> output
